patch.value: Promote plan workflow primitives to the public SDK: plan create/steps/dependencies/decisions/discoveries/validation/materialization

pm plan implements durable agent planning workflows (Codex/Claude/Cursor-style: steps with status transitions, dependencies, decisions, discoveries, validation results, materialization into tracked items) but its orchestration lives CLI-side and is not covered by any existing promotion item. SDK-first plus the universal-tool story (pm-w89s) require plan primitives to be public typed API so agent harnesses, MCP pm_plan, and custom tools consume the same engine. Duplicate check: pm-v7dj (closed original plan feature), pm-z5nb (open Plan item about the schema epic, unrelated); no open SDK-promotion overlap.

SDK exports typed plan primitives covering the full pm plan surface (create with stepTitle, step lifecycle, dependencies, decisions, discoveries, validation, materialize) with identical governance and history semantics; CLI and MCP plan surfaces consume only these primitives; docstrings + linked tests + SDK reference docs; zero behavior change (plan specs green).
